full_text:
Gu Shao (Xiaoze) 顧邵 (孝則)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gu Shao (顧邵), styledXiaoze (孝則), was born in Wu. Noted scholar, he married a daughter of Sun Ce and later met Pang Tong. Gu Shao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Gu Shao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
